parcels.title: My parcels
parcels.empty: You have no parcels registered yet. Your operator sets them up.

new_planting.confirm_body: This closes the current cycle of this parcel. The next dispatch will certify and charge again. Continue?
new_planting.success: New planting registered. Your operator was notified.
new_planting.in_progress: A certification is in progress for this parcel. Try again later.
new_planting.duplicate: You already declared a planting recently. Contact your operator if this was a mistake.
